metadata.name: Resolve Damaged Item from Online Order

description: A customer calls to report that an item they received from an online order arrived broken.

nodes.task_description: Look up the customer's online order using their name or order number.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent finds the correct order in the order management system.

nodes.task_description: Apologize for the issue and offer the customer a choice of a refund or a replacement item.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent provides clear resolution options.

nodes.task_description: The customer chooses a replacement. The agent creates a new, no-charge order for the same item to be shipped to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: A replacement order is created, resolving the customer's issue.
